name: Amish Friendship Bread
recipeInstructions:
1. Preheat the oven to 350°F.
2. In a large non-reactive bowl, mix together 3/4 cup skim milk, buttermilk, 3/4 cup flour, whole wheat flour, 1 tsp sugar, and yeast. Set aside for ten minutes or until the mixture starts to bubble.
3. In a large mixing bowl, place the remaining ingredients except hazlenuts and cherries. Mix well.
4. Fold in the hazlenuts and cherries.
5. Lightly wipe four 10x5x2 inch loaf pans with vegetable oil.
6. Divide the dough among the pans.
7. Bake for one hour or until a toothpick inserted into the center comes out clean.
